environment.notes: Three IB modes are kept separate: simulation/guidance, compile-only smoke, and official vendor runtime.

boundedBy: The official IBApi DLL/project path is external to the repo; Wave 1 keeps bootstrap evidence bounded until a sanitized local vendor run is captured.

environment.notes: Server-version bounds are validated in repo; actual TWS/Gateway version negotiation remains manual runtime evidence.

boundedBy: Entitlements depend on the operator's IB account and TWS/Gateway setup; the repo only proves guidance and compile-mode separation.

environment.notes: Reconnect proof requires a real TWS/Gateway session and vendor DLL path.
